1→//! Generic CPI for creating multiple compressed mints.
     2→//!
     3→//! This module provides framework-agnostic mint creation via `CreateMintsCpi`,
     4→//! generic over `AccountInfoTrait`. Account order matches the cToken program
     5→//! expectations (see `MintActionMetaConfig::to_account_metas` for reference).
     6→//!
     7→//! # Flow
     8→//!
     9→//! - N=1 (no CPI context offset): Single CPI (create + decompress)
    10→//! - N>1 or offset>0: 2N-1 CPIs (N-1 writes + 1 execute with decompress + N-1 decompress)
    11→
    12→use alloc::{vec, vec::Vec};
    13→
    14→use light_account_checks::{AccountInfoTrait, CpiMeta};
    15→use light_compressed_account::instruction_data::{
    16→    compressed_proof::CompressedProof, traits::LightInstructionData,
    17→};
    18→use light_token_interface::{
    19→    instructions::{
    20→        extensions::{ExtensionInstructionData, TokenMetadataInstructionData},
    21→        mint_action::{
    22→            Action, CpiContext, CreateMint, DecompressMintAction,
    23→            MintActionCompressedInstructionData, MintInstructionData,
    24→        },
    25→    },
    26→    state::MintMetadata,
    27→    COMPRESSED_MINT_SEED, LIGHT_TOKEN_PROGRAM_ID,
    28→};
    29→
    30→use crate::error::LightSdkTypesError;
    31→
    32→/// Default rent payment epochs (~24 hours).
    33→pub const DEFAULT_RENT_PAYMENT: u8 = 16;
    34→/// Default lamports for write operations (~3 hours per write).
    35→pub const DEFAULT_WRITE_TOP_UP: u32 = 766;
    36→
    37→// ============================================================================
    38→// Types
    39→// ============================================================================
    40→
    41→/// Parameters for a single mint within a batch creation.
    42→///
    43→/// All pubkeys are `[u8; 32]` for framework independence.
    44→/// `mint` and `compression_address` are derived internally from `mint_seed_pubkey`.
    45→#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
    46→pub struct SingleMintParams<'a> {
    47→    pub decimals: u8,
    48→    pub mint_authority: [u8; 32],
    49→    /// Optional mint bump. If `None`, derived from `find_mint_address(mint_seed_pubkey)`.
    50→    pub mint_bump: Option<u8>,
    51→    pub freeze_authority: Option<[u8; 32]>,
    52→    /// Mint seed pubkey (signer) for this mint. Used to derive `mint` PDA and `compression_address`.
    53→    pub mint_seed_pubkey: [u8; 32],
    54→    /// Optional authority seeds for PDA signing.
    55→    pub authority_seeds: Option<&'a [&'a [u8]]>,
    56→    /// Optional mint signer seeds for PDA signing.
    57→    pub mint_signer_seeds: Option<&'a [&'a [u8]]>,
    58→    /// Optional token metadata for the mint (reference to avoid stack overflow).
    59→    pub token_metadata: Option<&'a TokenMetadataInstructionData>,
    60→}
    61→
    62→/// Parameters for creating one or more compressed mints with decompression.
    63→///
    64→/// Creates N compressed mints and decompresses all to Solana Mint accounts.
    65→/// Uses CPI context pattern when N > 1 for efficiency.
    66→#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
    67→pub struct CreateMintsParams<'a> {
    68→    /// Parameters for each mint to create.
    69→    pub mints: &'a [SingleMintParams<'a>],
    70→    /// Single proof covering all new addresses.
    71→    pub proof: CompressedProof,
    72→    /// Root index for the address merkle tree (shared by all mints in batch).
    73→    pub address_merkle_tree_root_index: u16,
    74→    /// Rent payment in epochs for the Mint account (must be 0 or >= 2).
    75→    /// Default: 16 (~24 hours).
    76→    pub rent_payment: u8,
    77→    /// Lamports allocated for future write operations.
    78→    /// Default: 766 (~3 hours per write).
    79→    pub write_top_up: u32,
    80→    /// Offset for assigned_account_index when sharing CPI context with other accounts.
    81→    /// When creating mints alongside PDAs, this offset should be set to the number of
    82→    /// PDAs already written to the CPI context.
    83→    /// Default: 0 (no offset).
    84→    pub cpi_context_offset: u8,
    85→    /// Index of the output queue in tree accounts.
    86→    /// Default: 0.
    87→    pub output_queue_index: u8,
    88→    /// Index of the address merkle tree in tree accounts.
    89→    /// Default: 1.
    90→    pub address_tree_index: u8,
    91→    /// Index of the state merkle tree in tree accounts.
    92→    /// Required for decompress operations (discriminator validation).
    93→    /// Default: 2.
    94→    pub state_tree_index: u8,
    95→    /// Base leaf index from the output queue (required when N > 1).
    96→    /// Read from the queue's batch_metadata.next_index before any CPIs.
    97→    /// For N=1 with offset=0, pass 0.
    98→    pub base_leaf_index: u32,
    99→}
   100→
   101→#[cfg(feature = "cpi-context")]
   102→impl<'a> CreateMintsParams<'a> {
   103→    /// Create params from proof data and CPI accounts.
   104→    ///
   105→    /// Extracts tree indices and computes base_leaf_index automatically (only for N > 1 mints).
   106→    /// Uses default values for rent_payment, write_top_up, and cpi_context_offset.
   107→    pub fn from_proof<AI: light_account_checks::AccountInfoTrait + Clone>(
   108→        mints: &'a [SingleMintParams<'a>],
   109→        proof_data: &crate::interface::CreateAccountsProof,
   110→        cpi_accounts: &crate::cpi_accounts::v2::CpiAccounts<'_, AI>,
   111→    ) -> Result<Self, LightSdkTypesError> {
   112→        let proof = proof_data
   113→            .proof
   114→            .0
   115→            .ok_or(LightSdkTypesError::InvalidInstructionData)?;
   116→
   117→        let state_tree_index = proof_data
   118→            .state_tree_index
   119→            .ok_or(LightSdkTypesError::InvalidInstructionData)?;
   120→
   121→        let output_queue_index = proof_data.output_state_tree_index;
   122→
   123→        // Only read base_leaf_index when there are multiple mints (needed for decompress indexing)
   124→        let base_leaf_index = if mints.len() > 1 {
   125→            let output_queue = cpi_accounts.get_tree_account_info(output_queue_index as usize)?;
   126→            get_output_queue_next_index(output_queue)?
   127→        } else {
   128→            0
   129→        };
   130→
   131→        Ok(Self {
   132→            mints,
   133→            proof,
   134→            address_merkle_tree_root_index: proof_data.address_tree_info.root_index,
   135→            rent_payment: DEFAULT_RENT_PAYMENT,
   136→            write_top_up: DEFAULT_WRITE_TOP_UP,
   137→            cpi_context_offset: 0,
   138→            output_queue_index,
   139→            address_tree_index: proof_data
   140→                .address_tree_info
   141→                .address_merkle_tree_pubkey_index,
   142→            state_tree_index,
   143→            base_leaf_index,
   144→        })
   145→    }
   146→}
   147→
   148→/// Infrastructure accounts needed for mint creation CPI.
   149→///
   150→/// These accounts are passed from the user's Accounts struct.
   151→pub struct CreateMintsStaticAccounts<'a, AI: AccountInfoTrait + Clone> {
   152→    /// Fee payer for the transaction.
   153→    pub fee_payer: &'a AI,
   154→    /// CompressibleConfig account for the light-token program.
   155→    pub compressible_config: &'a AI,
   156→    /// Rent sponsor PDA.
   157→    pub rent_sponsor: &'a AI,
   158→    /// CPI authority PDA for signing.
   159→    pub cpi_authority: &'a AI,
   160→}
   161→
   162→/// CPI struct for creating multiple compressed mints.
   163→///
   164→/// Generic over `AccountInfoTrait` to work with both solana and pinocchio backends.
   165→/// Uses named account fields for clarity and safety.
   166→pub struct CreateMintsCpi<'a, AI: AccountInfoTrait + Clone> {
   167→    /// Mint seed accounts (signers) - one per mint.
   168→    pub mint_seed_accounts: &'a [AI],
   169→    /// Fee payer (also used as authority).
   170→    pub payer: &'a AI,
   171→    /// Address tree for new mint addresses.
   172→    pub address_tree: &'a AI,
   173→    /// Output queue for compressed accounts.
   174→    pub output_queue: &'a AI,
   175→    /// State merkle tree (required for decompress discriminator validation).
   176→    pub state_merkle_tree: &'a AI,
   177→    /// CompressibleConfig account.
   178→    pub compressible_config: &'a AI,
   179→    /// Mint PDA accounts (writable) - one per mint.
   180→    pub mints: &'a [AI],
   181→    /// Rent sponsor PDA.
   182→    pub rent_sponsor: &'a AI,
   183→    /// Light system program.
   184→    pub light_system_program: &'a AI,
   185→    /// CPI authority PDA.
   186→    pub cpi_authority_pda: &'a AI,
   187→    /// Registered program PDA.
   188→    pub registered_program_pda: &'a AI,
   189→    /// Account compression authority.
   190→    pub account_compression_authority: &'a AI,
   191→    /// Account compression program.
   192→    pub account_compression_program: &'a AI,
   193→    /// System program.
   194→    pub system_program: &'a AI,
   195→    /// CPI context account.
   196→    pub cpi_context_account: &'a AI,
   197→    /// Parameters.
   198→    pub params: CreateMintsParams<'a>,
   199→}
   200→
   201→impl<'a, AI: AccountInfoTrait + Clone> CreateMintsCpi<'a, AI> {
   202→    /// Validate that the struct is properly constructed.
   203→    #[inline(never)]
   204→    fn validate(&self) -> Result<(), LightSdkTypesError> {
   205→        let n = self.params.mints.len();
   206→        if n == 0 {
   207→            return Err(LightSdkTypesError::InvalidInstructionData);
   208→        }
   209→        if self.mint_seed_accounts.len() != n {
   210→            return Err(LightSdkTypesError::InvalidInstructionData);
   211→        }
   212→        if self.mints.len() != n {
   213→            return Err(LightSdkTypesError::InvalidInstructionData);
   214→        }
   215→        Ok(())
   216→    }
   217→
   218→    /// Execute all CPIs to create and decompress all mints.
   219→    #[inline(never)]
   220→    pub fn invoke(self) -> Result<(), LightSdkTypesError> {
   221→        self.validate()?;
   222→        let n = self.params.mints.len();
   223→
   224→        // Use single mint path only when:
   225→        // - N=1 AND
   226→        // - No CPI context offset (no PDAs were written to CPI context first)
   227→        if n == 1 && self.params.cpi_context_offset == 0 {
   228→            self.invoke_single_mint()
   229→        } else {
   230→            self.invoke_multiple_mints()
   231→        }
   232→    }
   233→
   234→    /// Handle the single mint case: create + decompress in one CPI.
   235→    #[inline(never)]
   236→    fn invoke_single_mint(self) -> Result<(), LightSdkTypesError> {
   237→        let mint_params = &self.params.mints[0];
   238→        let (mint, bump) = get_mint_and_bump::<AI>(mint_params);
   239→
   240→        let mint_data =
   241→            build_mint_instruction_data(mint_params, &self.mint_seed_accounts[0].key(), mint, bump);
   242→
   243→        let decompress_action = DecompressMintAction {
   244→            rent_payment: self.params.rent_payment,
   245→            write_top_up: self.params.write_top_up,
   246→        };
   247→
   248→        let instruction_data = MintActionCompressedInstructionData::new_mint(
   249→            self.params.address_merkle_tree_root_index,
   250→            self.params.proof,
   251→            mint_data,
   252→        )
   253→        .with_decompress_mint(decompress_action);
   254→
   255→        let ix_data = instruction_data
   256→            .data()
   257→            .map_err(|_| LightSdkTypesError::Borsh)?;
   258→
   259→        let (metas, account_infos) = self.build_mint_action(0, true, true, false);
   260→
   261→        self.invoke_mint_action_raw(&ix_data, &account_infos, &metas, 0)
   262→    }
   263→
   264→    /// Handle the multiple mints case: N-1 writes + 1 execute + N-1 decompress.
   265→    #[inline(never)]
   266→    fn invoke_multiple_mints(self) -> Result<(), LightSdkTypesError> {
   267→        let n = self.params.mints.len();
   268→        let base_leaf_index = self.params.base_leaf_index;
   269→
   270→        let decompress_action = DecompressMintAction {
   271→            rent_payment: self.params.rent_payment,
   272→            write_top_up: self.params.write_top_up,
   273→        };
   274→
   275→        // Write mints 0..N-2 to CPI context
   276→        for i in 0..(n - 1) {
   277→            self.invoke_cpi_write(i)?;
   278→        }
   279→
   280→        // Execute: create last mint + decompress it
   281→        self.invoke_execute(n - 1, &decompress_action)?;
   282→
   283→        // Decompress remaining mints (0..N-2)
   284→        for i in 0..(n - 1) {
   285→            self.invoke_decompress(i, base_leaf_index, &decompress_action)?;
   286→        }
   287→
   288→        Ok(())
   289→    }
   290→
   291→    /// Invoke a CPI write instruction for a single mint.
   292→    #[inline(never)]
   293→    fn invoke_cpi_write(&self, index: usize) -> Result<(), LightSdkTypesError> {
   294→        let mint_params = &self.params.mints[index];
   295→        let offset = self.params.cpi_context_offset;
   296→        let (mint, bump) = get_mint_and_bump::<AI>(mint_params);
   297→
   298→        let cpi_context = CpiContext {
   299→            set_context: index > 0 || offset > 0,
   300→            first_set_context: index == 0 && offset == 0,
   301→            in_tree_index: self.params.address_tree_index,
   302→            in_queue_index: self.params.output_queue_index,
   303→            out_queue_index: self.params.output_queue_index,
   304→            token_out_queue_index: 0,
   305→            assigned_account_index: offset + index as u8,
   306→            read_only_address_trees: [0; 4],
   307→            address_tree_pubkey: self.address_tree.key(),
   308→        };
   309→
   310→        let mint_data = build_mint_instruction_data(
   311→            mint_params,
   312→            &self.mint_seed_accounts[index].key(),
   313→            mint,
   314→            bump,
   315→        );
   316→
   317→        let instruction_data = MintActionCompressedInstructionData::new_mint_write_to_cpi_context(
   318→            self.params.address_merkle_tree_root_index,
   319→            mint_data,
   320→            cpi_context,
   321→        );
   322→
   323→        let ix_data = instruction_data
   324→            .data()
   325→            .map_err(|_| LightSdkTypesError::Borsh)?;
   326→
   327→        // CPI write account order:
   328→        // [0]: light_system_program
   329→        // [1]: mint_signer
   330→        // [2]: authority (payer)
   331→        // [3]: fee_payer (payer)
   332→        // [4]: cpi_authority_pda
   333→        // [5]: cpi_context
   334→        let metas = vec![
   335→            CpiMeta {
   336→                pubkey: self.light_system_program.key(),
   337→                is_signer: false,
   338→                is_writable: false,
   339→            },
   340→            CpiMeta {
   341→                pubkey: self.mint_seed_accounts[index].key(),
   342→                is_signer: true,
   343→                is_writable: false,
   344→            },
   345→            CpiMeta {
   346→                pubkey: self.payer.key(),
   347→                is_signer: true,
   348→                is_writable: false,
   349→            },
   350→            CpiMeta {
   351→                pubkey: self.payer.key(),
   352→                is_signer: true,
   353→                is_writable: true,
   354→            },
   355→            CpiMeta {
   356→                pubkey: self.cpi_authority_pda.key(),
   357→                is_signer: false,
   358→                is_writable: false,
   359→            },
   360→            CpiMeta {
   361→                pubkey: self.cpi_context_account.key(),
   362→                is_signer: false,
   363→                is_writable: true,
   364→            },
   365→        ];
   366→
   367→        let account_infos = vec![
   368→            self.light_system_program.clone(),
   369→            self.mint_seed_accounts[index].clone(),
   370→            self.payer.clone(),
   371→            self.payer.clone(),
   372→            self.cpi_authority_pda.clone(),
   373→            self.cpi_context_account.clone(),
   374→        ];
   375→
   376→        self.invoke_mint_action_raw(&ix_data, &account_infos, &metas, index)
   377→    }
   378→
   379→    /// Invoke the execute instruction (create last mint + decompress).
   380→    #[inline(never)]
   381→    fn invoke_execute(
   382→        &self,
   383→        last_idx: usize,
   384→        decompress_action: &DecompressMintAction,
   385→    ) -> Result<(), LightSdkTypesError> {
   386→        let mint_params = &self.params.mints[last_idx];
   387→        let offset = self.params.cpi_context_offset;
   388→        let (mint, bump) = get_mint_and_bump::<AI>(mint_params);
   389→
   390→        let mint_data = build_mint_instruction_data(
   391→            mint_params,
   392→            &self.mint_seed_accounts[last_idx].key(),
   393→            mint,
   394→            bump,
   395→        );
   396→
   397→        let instruction_data = MintActionCompressedInstructionData {
   398→            leaf_index: 0,
   399→            prove_by_index: false,
   400→            root_index: self.params.address_merkle_tree_root_index,
   401→            max_top_up: u16::MAX, // No limit
   402→            create_mint: Some(CreateMint::default()),
   403→            actions: vec![Action::DecompressMint(*decompress_action)],
   404→            proof: Some(self.params.proof),
   405→            cpi_context: Some(CpiContext {
   406→                set_context: false,
   407→                first_set_context: false,
   408→                in_tree_index: self.params.address_tree_index,
   409→                in_queue_index: self.params.address_tree_index,
   410→                out_queue_index: self.params.output_queue_index,
   411→                token_out_queue_index: 0,
   412→                assigned_account_index: offset + last_idx as u8,
   413→                read_only_address_trees: [0; 4],
   414→                address_tree_pubkey: self.address_tree.key(),
   415→            }),
   416→            mint: Some(mint_data),
   417→        };
   418→
   419→        let ix_data = instruction_data
   420→            .data()
   421→            .map_err(|_| LightSdkTypesError::Borsh)?;
   422→
   423→        let (metas, account_infos) = self.build_mint_action(last_idx, true, true, true);
   424→
   425→        self.invoke_mint_action_raw(&ix_data, &account_infos, &metas, last_idx)
   426→    }
   427→
   428→    /// Invoke decompress for a single mint.
   429→    #[inline(never)]
   430→    fn invoke_decompress(
   431→        &self,
   432→        index: usize,
   433→        base_leaf_index: u32,
   434→        decompress_action: &DecompressMintAction,
   435→    ) -> Result<(), LightSdkTypesError> {
   436→        let mint_params = &self.params.mints[index];
   437→        let (mint, bump) = get_mint_and_bump::<AI>(mint_params);
   438→
   439→        let mint_data = build_mint_instruction_data(
   440→            mint_params,
   441→            &self.mint_seed_accounts[index].key(),
   442→            mint,
   443→            bump,
   444→        );
   445→
   446→        let instruction_data = MintActionCompressedInstructionData {
   447→            leaf_index: base_leaf_index + self.params.cpi_context_offset as u32 + index as u32,
   448→            prove_by_index: true,
   449→            root_index: 0,
   450→            max_top_up: u16::MAX, // No limit
   451→            create_mint: None,
   452→            actions: vec![Action::DecompressMint(*decompress_action)],
   453→            proof: None,
   454→            cpi_context: None,
   455→            mint: Some(mint_data),
   456→        };
   457→
   458→        let ix_data = instruction_data
   459→            .data()
   460→            .map_err(|_| LightSdkTypesError::Borsh)?;
   461→
   462→        let (metas, account_infos) = self.build_decompress_action(index);
   463→
   464→        self.invoke_mint_action_raw(&ix_data, &account_infos, &metas, index)
   465→    }
   466→
   467→    /// Low-level invoke: build signer seeds from mint params and call CPI.
   468→    #[inline(never)]
   469→    fn invoke_mint_action_raw(
   470→        &self,
   471→        ix_data: &[u8],
   472→        account_infos: &[AI],
   473→        metas: &[CpiMeta],
   474→        mint_index: usize,
   475→    ) -> Result<(), LightSdkTypesError> {
   476→        let mint_params = &self.params.mints[mint_index];
   477→
   478→        // Build signer seeds - pack present seeds at start of array
   479→        let mut seeds: [&[&[u8]]; 2] = [&[], &[]];
   480→        let mut num_signers = 0;
   481→        if let Some(s) = mint_params.mint_signer_seeds {
   482→            seeds[num_signers] = s;
   483→            num_signers += 1;
   484→        }
   485→        if let Some(s) = mint_params.authority_seeds {
   486→            seeds[num_signers] = s;
   487→            num_signers += 1;
   488→        }
   489→
   490→        AI::invoke_cpi(
   491→            &LIGHT_TOKEN_PROGRAM_ID,
   492→            ix_data,
   493→            metas,
   494→            account_infos,
   495→            &seeds[..num_signers],
   496→        )
   497→        .map_err(|_| LightSdkTypesError::CpiFailed)
   498→    }
   499→
   500→    /// Build matched account metas and infos for a full mint action CPI.
   501→    ///
   502→    /// Returns `(metas, infos)` in identical order so pinocchio's 1:1
   503→    /// positional CPI requirement is satisfied without runtime reordering.
   504→    ///
   505→    /// Order matches `MintActionMetaConfig::to_account_metas`:
   506→    /// light_system_program, [mint_signer], authority, [compressible_config],
   507→    /// [mint], [rent_sponsor], fee_payer, cpi_authority_pda, registered_program_pda,
   508→    /// account_compression_authority, account_compression_program, system_program,
   509→    /// [cpi_context], output_queue, tree_pubkey, [input_queue]
   510→    #[inline(never)]
   511→    fn build_mint_action(
   512→        &self,
   513→        mint_index: usize,
   514→        has_input_queue: bool,
   515→        has_compressible: bool,
   516→        has_cpi_context: bool,
   517→    ) -> (Vec<CpiMeta>, Vec<AI>) {
   518→        let mut metas = Vec::with_capacity(17);
   519→        let mut infos = Vec::with_capacity(17);
   520→
   521→        // light_system_program
   522→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   523→            pubkey: self.light_system_program.key(),
   524→            is_signer: false,
   525→            is_writable: false,
   526→        });
   527→        infos.push(self.light_system_program.clone());
   528→
   529→        // mint_signer (always present for create_mint, must sign)
   530→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   531→            pubkey: self.mint_seed_accounts[mint_index].key(),
   532→            is_signer: true,
   533→            is_writable: false,
   534→        });
   535→        infos.push(self.mint_seed_accounts[mint_index].clone());
   536→
   537→        // authority (payer is authority)
   538→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   539→            pubkey: self.payer.key(),
   540→            is_signer: true,
   541→            is_writable: false,
   542→        });
   543→        infos.push(self.payer.clone());
   544→
   545→        if has_compressible {
   546→            // compressible_config
   547→            metas.push(CpiMeta {
   548→                pubkey: self.compressible_config.key(),
   549→                is_signer: false,
   550→                is_writable: false,
   551→            });
   552→            infos.push(self.compressible_config.clone());
   553→
   554→            // mint PDA (writable)
   555→            metas.push(CpiMeta {
   556→                pubkey: self.mints[mint_index].key(),
   557→                is_signer: false,
   558→                is_writable: true,
   559→            });
   560→            infos.push(self.mints[mint_index].clone());
   561→
   562→            // rent_sponsor (writable)
   563→            metas.push(CpiMeta {
   564→                pubkey: self.rent_sponsor.key(),
   565→                is_signer: false,
   566→                is_writable: true,
   567→            });
   568→            infos.push(self.rent_sponsor.clone());
   569→        }
   570→
   571→        // fee_payer (signer, writable)
   572→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   573→            pubkey: self.payer.key(),
   574→            is_signer: true,
   575→            is_writable: true,
   576→        });
   577→        infos.push(self.payer.clone());
   578→
   579→        // cpi_authority_pda
   580→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   581→            pubkey: self.cpi_authority_pda.key(),
   582→            is_signer: false,
   583→            is_writable: false,
   584→        });
   585→        infos.push(self.cpi_authority_pda.clone());
   586→
   587→        // registered_program_pda
   588→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   589→            pubkey: self.registered_program_pda.key(),
   590→            is_signer: false,
   591→            is_writable: false,
   592→        });
   593→        infos.push(self.registered_program_pda.clone());
   594→
   595→        // account_compression_authority
   596→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   597→            pubkey: self.account_compression_authority.key(),
   598→            is_signer: false,
   599→            is_writable: false,
   600→        });
   601→        infos.push(self.account_compression_authority.clone());
   602→
   603→        // account_compression_program
   604→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   605→            pubkey: self.account_compression_program.key(),
   606→            is_signer: false,
   607→            is_writable: false,
   608→        });
   609→        infos.push(self.account_compression_program.clone());
   610→
   611→        // system_program
   612→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   613→            pubkey: self.system_program.key(),
   614→            is_signer: false,
   615→            is_writable: false,
   616→        });
   617→        infos.push(self.system_program.clone());
   618→
   619→        // cpi_context (optional)
   620→        if has_cpi_context {
   621→            metas.push(CpiMeta {
   622→                pubkey: self.cpi_context_account.key(),
   623→                is_signer: false,
   624→                is_writable: true,
   625→            });
   626→            infos.push(self.cpi_context_account.clone());
   627→        }
   628→
   629→        // output_queue (writable)
   630→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   631→            pubkey: self.output_queue.key(),
   632→            is_signer: false,
   633→            is_writable: true,
   634→        });
   635→        infos.push(self.output_queue.clone());
   636→
   637→        // tree_pubkey (address_tree for create_mint)
   638→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   639→            pubkey: self.address_tree.key(),
   640→            is_signer: false,
   641→            is_writable: true,
   642→        });
   643→        infos.push(self.address_tree.clone());
   644→
   645→        // input_queue (optional, same as output_queue for create_mint)
   646→        if has_input_queue {
   647→            metas.push(CpiMeta {
   648→                pubkey: self.output_queue.key(),
   649→                is_signer: false,
   650→                is_writable: true,
   651→            });
   652→            infos.push(self.output_queue.clone());
   653→        }
   654→
   655→        (metas, infos)
   656→    }
   657→
   658→    /// Build matched account metas and infos for a decompress CPI.
   659→    ///
   660→    /// For prove_by_index, tree_pubkey must be state_merkle_tree for discriminator validation.
   661→    #[inline(never)]
   662→    fn build_decompress_action(&self, mint_index: usize) -> (Vec<CpiMeta>, Vec<AI>) {
   663→        let mut metas = Vec::with_capacity(14);
   664→        let mut infos = Vec::with_capacity(14);
   665→
   666→        // light_system_program
   667→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   668→            pubkey: self.light_system_program.key(),
   669→            is_signer: false,
   670→            is_writable: false,
   671→        });
   672→        infos.push(self.light_system_program.clone());
   673→
   674→        // No mint_signer for decompress
   675→
   676→        // authority (payer is authority, signer)
   677→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   678→            pubkey: self.payer.key(),
   679→            is_signer: true,
   680→            is_writable: false,
   681→        });
   682→        infos.push(self.payer.clone());
   683→
   684→        // compressible_config
   685→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   686→            pubkey: self.compressible_config.key(),
   687→            is_signer: false,
   688→            is_writable: false,
   689→        });
   690→        infos.push(self.compressible_config.clone());
   691→
   692→        // mint PDA (writable)
   693→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   694→            pubkey: self.mints[mint_index].key(),
   695→            is_signer: false,
   696→            is_writable: true,
   697→        });
   698→        infos.push(self.mints[mint_index].clone());
   699→
   700→        // rent_sponsor (writable)
   701→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   702→            pubkey: self.rent_sponsor.key(),
   703→            is_signer: false,
   704→            is_writable: true,
   705→        });
   706→        infos.push(self.rent_sponsor.clone());
   707→
   708→        // fee_payer (signer, writable)
   709→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   710→            pubkey: self.payer.key(),
   711→            is_signer: true,
   712→            is_writable: true,
   713→        });
   714→        infos.push(self.payer.clone());
   715→
   716→        // cpi_authority_pda
   717→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   718→            pubkey: self.cpi_authority_pda.key(),
   719→            is_signer: false,
   720→            is_writable: false,
   721→        });
   722→        infos.push(self.cpi_authority_pda.clone());
   723→
   724→        // registered_program_pda
   725→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   726→            pubkey: self.registered_program_pda.key(),
   727→            is_signer: false,
   728→            is_writable: false,
   729→        });
   730→        infos.push(self.registered_program_pda.clone());
   731→
   732→        // account_compression_authority
   733→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   734→            pubkey: self.account_compression_authority.key(),
   735→            is_signer: false,
   736→            is_writable: false,
   737→        });
   738→        infos.push(self.account_compression_authority.clone());
   739→
   740→        // account_compression_program
   741→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   742→            pubkey: self.account_compression_program.key(),
   743→            is_signer: false,
   744→            is_writable: false,
   745→        });
   746→        infos.push(self.account_compression_program.clone());
   747→
   748→        // system_program
   749→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   750→            pubkey: self.system_program.key(),
   751→            is_signer: false,
   752→            is_writable: false,
   753→        });
   754→        infos.push(self.system_program.clone());
   755→
   756→        // No cpi_context for decompress
   757→
   758→        // output_queue (writable)
   759→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   760→            pubkey: self.output_queue.key(),
   761→            is_signer: false,
   762→            is_writable: true,
   763→        });
   764→        infos.push(self.output_queue.clone());
   765→
   766→        // tree_pubkey = state_merkle_tree for prove_by_index discriminator check
   767→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   768→            pubkey: self.state_merkle_tree.key(),
   769→            is_signer: false,
   770→            is_writable: true,
   771→        });
   772→        infos.push(self.state_merkle_tree.clone());
   773→
   774→        // input_queue = output_queue
   775→        metas.push(CpiMeta {
   776→            pubkey: self.output_queue.key(),
   777→            is_signer: false,
   778→            is_writable: true,
   779→        });
   780→        infos.push(self.output_queue.clone());
   781→
   782→        (metas, infos)
   783→    }
   784→}
   785→
   786→// ============================================================================
   787→// Helpers
   788→// ============================================================================
   789→
   790→/// Get mint PDA and bump, deriving mint always and bump if None.
   791→#[inline(never)]
   792→fn get_mint_and_bump<AI: AccountInfoTrait>(params: &SingleMintParams) -> ([u8; 32], u8) {
   793→    let (mint, derived_bump) = find_mint_address::<AI>(&params.mint_seed_pubkey);
   794→    let bump = params.mint_bump.unwrap_or(derived_bump);
   795→    (mint, bump)
   796→}
   797→
   798→/// Build `MintInstructionData` for a single mint.
   799→///
   800→/// `mint` and `bump` are derived externally from `mint_seed_pubkey` using `get_mint_and_bump`.
   801→#[inline(never)]
   802→fn build_mint_instruction_data(
   803→    mint_params: &SingleMintParams<'_>,
   804→    mint_signer: &[u8; 32],
   805→    mint: [u8; 32],
   806→    bump: u8,
   807→) -> MintInstructionData {
   808→    let extensions = mint_params
   809→        .token_metadata
   810→        .cloned()
   811→        .map(|metadata| vec![ExtensionInstructionData::TokenMetadata(metadata)]);
   812→
   813→    MintInstructionData {
   814→        supply: 0,
   815→        decimals: mint_params.decimals,
   816→        metadata: MintMetadata {
   817→            version: 3,
   818→            mint: mint.into(),
   819→            mint_decompressed: false,
   820→            mint_signer: *mint_signer,
   821→            bump,
   822→        },
   823→        mint_authority: Some(mint_params.mint_authority.into()),
   824→        freeze_authority: mint_params.freeze_authority.map(|a| a.into()),
   825→        extensions,
   826→    }
   827→}
   828→
   829→/// Find the mint PDA address for a given mint seed.
   830→///
   831→/// Generic over `AccountInfoTrait` to use the correct backend for PDA derivation.
   832→/// Returns `([u8; 32], u8)` -- the PDA address bytes and bump.
   833→pub fn find_mint_address<AI: AccountInfoTrait>(mint_seed: &[u8; 32]) -> ([u8; 32], u8) {
   834→    AI::find_program_address(
   835→        &[COMPRESSED_MINT_SEED, mint_seed.as_ref()],
   836→        &LIGHT_TOKEN_PROGRAM_ID,
   837→    )
   838→}
   839→
   840→/// Derive the compressed mint address from a mint seed and address tree pubkey.
   841→///
   842→/// This computes `derive_address(find_mint_address(mint_seed).0, address_tree, LIGHT_TOKEN_PROGRAM_ID)`.
   843→pub fn derive_mint_compressed_address<AI: AccountInfoTrait>(
   844→    mint_seed: &[u8; 32],
   845→    address_tree_pubkey: &[u8; 32],
   846→) -> [u8; 32] {
   847→    light_compressed_account::address::derive_address(
   848→        &find_mint_address::<AI>(mint_seed).0,
   849→        address_tree_pubkey,
   850→        &LIGHT_TOKEN_PROGRAM_ID,
   851→    )
   852→}
   853→
   854→/// Read the next_index from a batched output queue account.
   855→///
   856→/// Offset 288 = 8 (discriminator) + 232 (QueueMetadata) + 48 (6 x u64 in QueueBatches).
   857→/// This reads the raw bytes to avoid depending on `light-batched-merkle-tree`.
   858→pub fn get_output_queue_next_index<AI: AccountInfoTrait>(
   859→    queue: &AI,
   860→) -> Result<u32, LightSdkTypesError> {
   861→    const NEXT_INDEX_OFFSET: usize = 288;
   862→    let data = queue
   863→        .try_borrow_data()
   864→        .map_err(LightSdkTypesError::AccountError)?;
   865→    if data.len() < NEXT_INDEX_OFFSET + 8 {
   866→        return Err(LightSdkTypesError::AccountDataTooSmall);
   867→    }
   868→    let next_index = u64::from_le_bytes(
   869→        data[NEXT_INDEX_OFFSET..NEXT_INDEX_OFFSET + 8]
   870→            .try_into()
   871→            .unwrap(),
   872→    );
   873→    Ok(next_index as u32)
   874→}
   875→
   876→// ============================================================================
   877→// High-level CreateMints API
   878→// ============================================================================
   879→
   880→/// High-level struct for creating compressed mints.
   881→///
   882→/// Consolidates proof parsing, tree account resolution, and CPI invocation into
   883→/// a single `.invoke()` call. This is the recommended API for creating mints.
   884→///
   885→/// # Example
   886→///
   887→/// ```rust,ignore
   888→/// CreateMints {
   889→///     mints: &sdk_mints,
   890→///     proof_data: &params.create_accounts_proof,
   891→///     mint_seed_accounts,
   892→///     mint_accounts,
   893→///     static_accounts: CreateMintsStaticAccounts { ... },
   894→///     cpi_context_offset: 0,
   895→/// }
   896→/// .invoke(&cpi_accounts)?;
   897→/// ```
   898→#[cfg(feature = "cpi-context")]
   899→pub struct CreateMints<'a, AI: AccountInfoTrait + Clone> {
   900→    /// Per-mint parameters.
   901→    pub mints: &'a [SingleMintParams<'a>],
   902→    /// Proof data containing tree indices, proof, etc.
   903→    pub proof_data: &'a crate::interface::CreateAccountsProof,
   904→    /// Mint seed accounts (signers) - one per mint.
   905→    pub mint_seed_accounts: &'a [AI],
   906→    /// Mint PDA accounts (writable) - one per mint.
   907→    pub mint_accounts: &'a [AI],
   908→    /// Infrastructure accounts (payer, config, rent_sponsor, cpi_authority).
   909→    pub static_accounts: CreateMintsStaticAccounts<'a, AI>,
   910→    /// Offset for assigned_account_index when sharing CPI context with other accounts.
   911→    /// When creating mints alongside PDAs, this should be the number of PDAs already
   912→    /// written to the CPI context. Default: 0.
   913→    pub cpi_context_offset: u8,
   914→}
   915→
   916→#[cfg(feature = "cpi-context")]
   917→impl<'a, AI: AccountInfoTrait + Clone> CreateMints<'a, AI> {
   918→    /// Execute mint creation by:
   919→    /// 1. Building CreateMintsParams from proof_data
   920→    /// 2. Resolving tree accounts from cpi_accounts
   921→    /// 3. Invoking CreateMintsCpi
   922→    pub fn invoke(
   923→        self,
   924→        cpi_accounts: &crate::cpi_accounts::v2::CpiAccounts<'_, AI>,
   925→    ) -> Result<(), LightSdkTypesError> {
   926→        let mut params = CreateMintsParams::from_proof(self.mints, self.proof_data, cpi_accounts)?;
   927→        params.cpi_context_offset = self.cpi_context_offset;
   928→
   929→        invoke_create_mints(
   930→            self.mint_seed_accounts,
   931→            self.mint_accounts,
   932→            params,
   933→            self.static_accounts,
   934→            cpi_accounts,
   935→        )
   936→    }
   937→}
   938→
   939→/// Convenience function that extracts accounts from CpiAccounts and invokes CreateMintsCpi.
   940→///
   941→/// For new code, prefer using [`CreateMints`] with `.invoke()` instead.
   942→#[cfg(feature = "cpi-context")]
   943→fn invoke_create_mints<'a, AI: AccountInfoTrait + Clone>(
   944→    mint_seed_accounts: &'a [AI],
   945→    mint_accounts: &'a [AI],
   946→    params: CreateMintsParams<'a>,
   947→    infra: CreateMintsStaticAccounts<'a, AI>,
   948→    cpi_accounts: &crate::cpi_accounts::v2::CpiAccounts<'_, AI>,
   949→) -> Result<(), LightSdkTypesError> {
   950→    let output_queue = cpi_accounts
   951→        .get_tree_account_info(params.output_queue_index as usize)?
   952→        .clone();
   953→    let state_merkle_tree = cpi_accounts
   954→        .get_tree_account_info(params.state_tree_index as usize)?
   955→        .clone();
   956→    let address_tree = cpi_accounts
   957→        .get_tree_account_info(params.address_tree_index as usize)?
   958→        .clone();
   959→
   960→    CreateMintsCpi {
   961→        mint_seed_accounts,
   962→        payer: infra.fee_payer,
   963→        address_tree: &address_tree,
   964→        output_queue: &output_queue,
   965→        state_merkle_tree: &state_merkle_tree,
   966→        compressible_config: infra.compressible_config,
   967→        mints: mint_accounts,
   968→        rent_sponsor: infra.rent_sponsor,
   969→        light_system_program: cpi_accounts.light_system_program()?,
   970→        cpi_authority_pda: infra.cpi_authority,
   971→        registered_program_pda: cpi_accounts.registered_program_pda()?,
   972→        account_compression_authority: cpi_accounts.account_compression_authority()?,
   973→        account_compression_program: cpi_accounts.account_compression_program()?,
   974→        system_program: cpi_accounts.system_program()?,
   975→        cpi_context_account: cpi_accounts.cpi_context()?,
   976→        params,
   977→    }
   978→    .invoke()
   979→}
   980→

1→//! Create multiple Light Mints and decompress all to Solana Mint accounts.
     2→//!
     3→//! This module provides functionality for batch creating Light Mints with
     4→//! optimal CPI batching. When creating multiple mints, it uses the CPI context
     5→//! pattern to minimize transaction overhead.
     6→//!
     7→//! # Flow
     8→//!
     9→//! - N=1: Single CPI (create + decompress)
    10→//! - N>1: 2N-1 CPIs (N-1 writes + 1 execute with decompress + N-1 decompress)
    11→
    12→use light_batched_merkle_tree::queue::BatchedQueueAccount;
    13→use light_compressed_account::instruction_data::traits::LightInstructionData;
    14→use light_compressed_token_sdk::compressed_token::mint_action::{
    15→    get_mint_action_instruction_account_metas_cpi_write, MintActionMetaConfig,
    16→    MintActionMetaConfigCpiWrite,
    17→};
    18→use light_token_interface::{
    19→    instructions::{
    20→        extensions::{ExtensionInstructionData, TokenMetadataInstructionData},
    21→        mint_action::{
    22→            Action, CpiContext, CreateMint, DecompressMintAction,
    23→            MintActionCompressedInstructionData, MintInstructionData,
    24→        },
    25→    },
    26→    state::MintMetadata,
    27→    LIGHT_TOKEN_PROGRAM_ID,
    28→};
    29→use solana_account_info::AccountInfo;
    30→use solana_instruction::Instruction;
    31→use solana_program_error::ProgramError;
    32→use solana_pubkey::Pubkey;
    33→
    34→use super::SystemAccountInfos;
    35→
    36→/// Default rent payment epochs (~24 hours)
    37→pub const DEFAULT_RENT_PAYMENT: u8 = 16;
    38→/// Default lamports for write operations (~3 hours per write)
    39→pub const DEFAULT_WRITE_TOP_UP: u32 = 766;
    40→
    41→/// Parameters for a single mint within a batch creation.
    42→///
    43→/// Does not include proof since proof is shared across all mints in the batch.
    44→/// `mint` and `compression_address` are derived internally from `mint_seed_pubkey`.
    45→#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
    46→pub struct SingleMintParams<'a> {
    47→    pub decimals: u8,
    48→    pub mint_authority: Pubkey,
    49→    /// Optional mint bump. If `None`, derived from `find_mint_address(mint_seed_pubkey)`.
    50→    pub mint_bump: Option<u8>,
    51→    pub freeze_authority: Option<Pubkey>,
    52→    /// Mint seed pubkey (signer) for this mint. Used to derive `mint` PDA and `compression_address`.
    53→    pub mint_seed_pubkey: Pubkey,
    54→    /// Optional authority seeds for PDA signing
    55→    pub authority_seeds: Option<&'a [&'a [u8]]>,
    56→    /// Optional mint signer seeds for PDA signing
    57→    pub mint_signer_seeds: Option<&'a [&'a [u8]]>,
    58→    /// Optional token metadata for the mint (reference to avoid stack overflow)
    59→    pub token_metadata: Option<&'a TokenMetadataInstructionData>,
    60→}
    61→
    62→/// Parameters for creating one or more Light Mints with decompression.
    63→///
    64→/// Creates N Light Mints and decompresses all to Solana Mint accounts.
    65→/// Uses CPI context pattern when N > 1 for efficiency.
    66→#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
    67→pub struct CreateMintsParams<'a> {
    68→    /// Parameters for each mint to create
    69→    pub mints: &'a [SingleMintParams<'a>],
    70→    /// Single proof covering all new addresses
    71→    pub proof: light_compressed_account::instruction_data::compressed_proof::CompressedProof,
    72→    /// Root index for the address merkle tree (shared by all mints in batch).
    73→    pub address_merkle_tree_root_index: u16,
    74→    /// Rent payment in epochs for the Mint account (must be 0 or >= 2).
    75→    /// Default: 16 (~24 hours)
    76→    pub rent_payment: u8,
    77→    /// Lamports allocated for future write operations.
    78→    /// Default: 766 (~3 hours per write)
    79→    pub write_top_up: u32,
    80→    /// Offset for assigned_account_index when sharing CPI context with other accounts.
    81→    /// When creating mints alongside PDAs, this offset should be set to the number of
    82→    /// PDAs already written to the CPI context.
    83→    /// Default: 0 (no offset)
    84→    pub cpi_context_offset: u8,
    85→    /// Index of the output queue in tree accounts.
    86→    /// Default: 0
    87→    pub output_queue_index: u8,
    88→    /// Index of the address merkle tree in tree accounts.
    89→    /// Default: 1
    90→    pub address_tree_index: u8,
    91→    /// Index of the state merkle tree in tree accounts.
    92→    /// Required for decompress operations (discriminator validation).
    93→    /// Default: 2
    94→    pub state_tree_index: u8,
    95→}
    96→
    97→impl<'a> CreateMintsParams<'a> {
    98→    #[inline(never)]
    99→    pub fn new(
   100→        mints: &'a [SingleMintParams<'a>],
   101→        proof: light_compressed_account::instruction_data::compressed_proof::CompressedProof,
   102→        address_merkle_tree_root_index: u16,
   103→    ) -> Self {
   104→        Self {
   105→            mints,
   106→            proof,
   107→            address_merkle_tree_root_index,
   108→            rent_payment: DEFAULT_RENT_PAYMENT,
   109→            write_top_up: DEFAULT_WRITE_TOP_UP,
   110→            cpi_context_offset: 0,
   111→            output_queue_index: 0,
   112→            address_tree_index: 1,
   113→            state_tree_index: 2,
   114→        }
   115→    }
   116→
   117→    pub fn with_rent_payment(mut self, rent_payment: u8) -> Self {
   118→        self.rent_payment = rent_payment;
   119→        self
   120→    }
   121→
   122→    pub fn with_write_top_up(mut self, write_top_up: u32) -> Self {
   123→        self.write_top_up = write_top_up;
   124→        self
   125→    }
   126→
   127→    /// Set offset for assigned_account_index when sharing CPI context.
   128→    ///
   129→    /// Use this when creating mints alongside PDAs. The offset should be
   130→    /// the number of accounts already written to the CPI context.
   131→    pub fn with_cpi_context_offset(mut self, offset: u8) -> Self {
   132→        self.cpi_context_offset = offset;
   133→        self
   134→    }
   135→
   136→    /// Set the output queue index in tree accounts.
   137→    pub fn with_output_queue_index(mut self, index: u8) -> Self {
   138→        self.output_queue_index = index;
   139→        self
   140→    }
   141→
   142→    /// Set the address merkle tree index in tree accounts.
   143→    pub fn with_address_tree_index(mut self, index: u8) -> Self {
   144→        self.address_tree_index = index;
   145→        self
   146→    }
   147→
   148→    /// Set the state merkle tree index in tree accounts.
   149→    /// Required for decompress operations (discriminator validation).
   150→    pub fn with_state_tree_index(mut self, index: u8) -> Self {
   151→        self.state_tree_index = index;
   152→        self
   153→    }
   154→}
   155→
   156→/// CPI struct for on-chain programs to create multiple mints.
   157→///
   158→/// Uses named account fields for clarity and safety - no manual index calculations.
   159→///
   160→/// # Example
   161→///
   162→/// ```rust,ignore
   163→/// use light_token::instruction::{CreateMintsCpi, CreateMintsParams, SingleMintParams, SystemAccountInfos};
   164→///
   165→/// let params = CreateMintsParams::new(vec![mint_params_1, mint_params_2], proof);
   166→///
   167→/// CreateMintsCpi {
   168→///     mint_seeds: vec![mint_signer1.clone(), mint_signer2.clone()],
   169→///     payer: payer.clone(),
   170→///     address_tree: address_tree.clone(),
   171→///     output_queue: output_queue.clone(),
   172→///     compressible_config: config.clone(),
   173→///     mints: vec![mint_pda1.clone(), mint_pda2.clone()],
   174→///     rent_sponsor: rent_sponsor.clone(),
   175→///     system_accounts: SystemAccountInfos { ... },
   176→///     cpi_context_account: cpi_context.clone(),
   177→///     params,
   178→/// }.invoke()?;
   179→/// ```
   180→pub struct CreateMintsCpi<'a, 'info> {
   181→    /// Mint seed accounts (signers) - one per mint
   182→    pub mint_seed_accounts: &'a [AccountInfo<'info>],
   183→    /// Fee payer (also used as authority)
   184→    pub payer: AccountInfo<'info>,
   185→    /// Address tree for new mint addresses
   186→    pub address_tree: AccountInfo<'info>,
   187→    /// Output queue for compressed accounts
   188→    pub output_queue: AccountInfo<'info>,
   189→    /// State merkle tree (required for decompress discriminator validation)
   190→    pub state_merkle_tree: AccountInfo<'info>,
   191→    /// CompressibleConfig account
   192→    pub compressible_config: AccountInfo<'info>,
   193→    /// Mint PDA accounts (writable) - one per mint
   194→    pub mints: &'a [AccountInfo<'info>],
   195→    /// Rent sponsor PDA
   196→    pub rent_sponsor: AccountInfo<'info>,
   197→    /// Standard Light Protocol system accounts
   198→    pub system_accounts: SystemAccountInfos<'info>,
   199→    /// CPI context account
   200→    pub cpi_context_account: AccountInfo<'info>,
   201→    /// Parameters
   202→    pub params: CreateMintsParams<'a>,
   203→}
   204→
   205→impl<'a, 'info> CreateMintsCpi<'a, 'info> {
   206→    /// Validate that the struct is properly constructed.
   207→    #[inline(never)]
   208→    pub fn validate(&self) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
   209→        let n = self.params.mints.len();
   210→        if n == 0 {
   211→            return Err(ProgramError::InvalidArgument);
   212→        }
   213→        if self.mint_seed_accounts.len() != n {
   214→            return Err(ProgramError::InvalidArgument);
   215→        }
   216→        if self.mints.len() != n {
   217→            return Err(ProgramError::InvalidArgument);
   218→        }
   219→        Ok(())
   220→    }
   221→
   222→    /// Execute all CPIs to create and decompress all mints.
   223→    ///
   224→    /// Signer seeds are extracted from `SingleMintParams::mint_signer_seeds` and
   225→    /// `SingleMintParams::authority_seeds` for each CPI call (0, 1, or 2 seeds per call).
   226→    #[inline(never)]
   227→    pub fn invoke(self) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
   228→        self.validate()?;
   229→        let n = self.params.mints.len();
   230→
   231→        // Use single mint path only when:
   232→        // - N=1 AND
   233→        // - No CPI context offset (no PDAs were written to CPI context first)
   234→        if n == 1 && self.params.cpi_context_offset == 0 {
   235→            self.invoke_single_mint()
   236→        } else {
   237→            self.invoke_multiple_mints()
   238→        }
   239→    }
   240→
   241→    /// Handle the single mint case: create + decompress in one CPI.
   242→    #[inline(never)]
   243→    fn invoke_single_mint(self) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
   244→        let mint_params = &self.params.mints[0];
   245→        let (mint, bump) = get_mint_and_bump(mint_params);
   246→
   247→        let mint_data =
   248→            build_mint_instruction_data(mint_params, self.mint_seed_accounts[0].key, mint, bump);
   249→
   250→        let decompress_action = DecompressMintAction {
   251→            rent_payment: self.params.rent_payment,
   252→            write_top_up: self.params.write_top_up,
   253→        };
   254→
   255→        let instruction_data = MintActionCompressedInstructionData::new_mint(
   256→            self.params.address_merkle_tree_root_index,
   257→            self.params.proof,
   258→            mint_data,
   259→        )
   260→        .with_decompress_mint(decompress_action);
   261→
   262→        let mut meta_config = MintActionMetaConfig::new_create_mint(
   263→            *self.payer.key,
   264→            *self.payer.key,
   265→            *self.mint_seed_accounts[0].key,
   266→            *self.address_tree.key,
   267→            *self.output_queue.key,
   268→            *self.compressible_config.key,
   269→            *self.rent_sponsor.key,
   270→        )
   271→        .with_compressible_mint(
   272→            *self.mints[0].key,
   273→            *self.compressible_config.key,
   274→            *self.rent_sponsor.key,
   275→        );
   276→        meta_config.input_queue = Some(*self.output_queue.key);
   277→
   278→        self.invoke_mint_action(instruction_data, meta_config, 0)
   279→    }
   280→
   281→    /// Handle the multiple mints case: N-1 writes + 1 execute + N-1 decompress.
   282→    #[inline(never)]
   283→    fn invoke_multiple_mints(self) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
   284→        let n = self.params.mints.len();
   285→
   286→        // Get base leaf index before any CPIs modify the queue
   287→        let base_leaf_index = get_base_leaf_index(&self.output_queue)?;
   288→
   289→        let decompress_action = DecompressMintAction {
   290→            rent_payment: self.params.rent_payment,
   291→            write_top_up: self.params.write_top_up,
   292→        };
   293→
   294→        // Write mints 0..N-2 to CPI context
   295→        for i in 0..(n - 1) {
   296→            self.invoke_cpi_write(i)?;
   297→        }
   298→
   299→        // Execute: create last mint + decompress it
   300→        self.invoke_execute(n - 1, &decompress_action)?;
   301→
   302→        // Decompress remaining mints (0..N-2)
   303→        for i in 0..(n - 1) {
   304→            self.invoke_decompress(i, base_leaf_index, &decompress_action)?;
   305→        }
   306→
   307→        Ok(())
   308→    }
   309→
   310→    /// Invoke a CPI write instruction for a single mint.
   311→    /// Extracts signer seeds from mint params (0, 1, or 2 seeds).
   312→    #[inline(never)]
   313→    fn invoke_cpi_write(&self, index: usize) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
   314→        let mint_params = &self.params.mints[index];
   315→        let offset = self.params.cpi_context_offset;
   316→        let (mint, bump) = get_mint_and_bump(mint_params);
   317→
   318→        // When sharing CPI context with PDAs:
   319→        // - first_set_context: only true for index 0 AND offset 0 (first write to context)
   320→        // - set_context: true if appending to existing context (index > 0 or offset > 0)
   321→        // - assigned_account_index: offset + index (to not collide with PDA indices)
   322→        let cpi_context = CpiContext {
   323→            set_context: index > 0 || offset > 0,
   324→            first_set_context: index == 0 && offset == 0,
   325→            in_tree_index: self.params.address_tree_index,
   326→            in_queue_index: self.params.output_queue_index,
   327→            out_queue_index: self.params.output_queue_index,
   328→            token_out_queue_index: 0,
   329→            assigned_account_index: offset + index as u8,
   330→            read_only_address_trees: [0; 4],
   331→            address_tree_pubkey: self.address_tree.key.to_bytes(),
   332→        };
   333→
   334→        let mint_data = build_mint_instruction_data(
   335→            mint_params,
   336→            self.mint_seed_accounts[index].key,
   337→            mint,
   338→            bump,
   339→        );
   340→
   341→        let instruction_data = MintActionCompressedInstructionData::new_mint_write_to_cpi_context(
   342→            self.params.address_merkle_tree_root_index,
   343→            mint_data,
   344→            cpi_context,
   345→        );
   346→
   347→        let cpi_write_config = MintActionMetaConfigCpiWrite {
   348→            fee_payer: *self.payer.key,
   349→            mint_signer: Some(*self.mint_seed_accounts[index].key),
   350→            authority: *self.payer.key,
   351→            cpi_context: *self.cpi_context_account.key,
   352→        };
   353→
   354→        let account_metas = get_mint_action_instruction_account_metas_cpi_write(cpi_write_config);
   355→        let ix_data = instruction_data
   356→            .data()
   357→            .map_err(|e| ProgramError::BorshIoError(e.to_string()))?;
   358→
   359→        // Account order matches get_mint_action_instruction_account_metas_cpi_write:
   360→        // [0]: light_system_program
   361→        // [1]: mint_signer (optional, when present)
   362→        // [2]: authority
   363→        // [3]: fee_payer
   364→        // [4]: cpi_authority_pda
   365→        // [5]: cpi_context
   366→        let account_infos = [
   367→            self.system_accounts.light_system_program.clone(),
   368→            self.mint_seed_accounts[index].clone(),
   369→            self.payer.clone(),
   370→            self.payer.clone(),
   371→            self.system_accounts.cpi_authority_pda.clone(),
   372→            self.cpi_context_account.clone(),
   373→        ];
   374→        let instruction = Instruction {
   375→            program_id: Pubkey::new_from_array(LIGHT_TOKEN_PROGRAM_ID),
   376→            accounts: account_metas,
   377→            data: ix_data,
   378→        };
   379→
   380→        // Build signer seeds - pack present seeds at start of array
   381→        let mut seeds: [&[&[u8]]; 2] = [&[], &[]];
   382→        let mut num_signers = 0;
   383→        if let Some(s) = mint_params.mint_signer_seeds {
   384→            seeds[num_signers] = s;
   385→            num_signers += 1;
   386→        }
   387→        if let Some(s) = mint_params.authority_seeds {
   388→            seeds[num_signers] = s;
   389→            num_signers += 1;
   390→        }
   391→        solana_cpi::invoke_signed(&instruction, &account_infos, &seeds[..num_signers])
   392→    }
   393→
   394→    /// Invoke the execute instruction (create last mint + decompress).
   395→    /// Extracts signer seeds from mint params (0, 1, or 2 seeds).
   396→    #[inline(never)]
   397→    fn invoke_execute(
   398→        &self,
   399→        last_idx: usize,
   400→        decompress_action: &DecompressMintAction,
   401→    ) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
   402→        let mint_params = &self.params.mints[last_idx];
   403→        let offset = self.params.cpi_context_offset;
   404→        let (mint, bump) = get_mint_and_bump(mint_params);
   405→
   406→        let mint_data = build_mint_instruction_data(
   407→            mint_params,
   408→            self.mint_seed_accounts[last_idx].key,
   409→            mint,
   410→            bump,
   411→        );
   412→
   413→        // Create struct directly to reduce stack usage (avoid builder pattern intermediates)
   414→        let instruction_data = MintActionCompressedInstructionData {
   415→            leaf_index: 0,
   416→            prove_by_index: false,
   417→            root_index: self.params.address_merkle_tree_root_index,
   418→            max_top_up: u16::MAX, // No limit
   419→            create_mint: Some(CreateMint::default()),
   420→            actions: vec![Action::DecompressMint(*decompress_action)],
   421→            proof: Some(self.params.proof),
   422→            cpi_context: Some(CpiContext {
   423→                set_context: false,
   424→                first_set_context: false,
   425→                in_tree_index: self.params.address_tree_index,
   426→                in_queue_index: self.params.address_tree_index,
   427→                out_queue_index: self.params.output_queue_index,
   428→                token_out_queue_index: 0,
   429→                assigned_account_index: offset + last_idx as u8,
   430→                read_only_address_trees: [0; 4],
   431→                address_tree_pubkey: self.address_tree.key.to_bytes(),
   432→            }),
   433→            mint: Some(mint_data),
   434→        };
   435→
   436→        let mut meta_config = MintActionMetaConfig::new_create_mint(
   437→            *self.payer.key,
   438→            *self.payer.key,
   439→            *self.mint_seed_accounts[last_idx].key,
   440→            *self.address_tree.key,
   441→            *self.output_queue.key,
   442→            *self.compressible_config.key,
   443→            *self.rent_sponsor.key,
   444→        )
   445→        .with_compressible_mint(
   446→            *self.mints[last_idx].key,
   447→            *self.compressible_config.key,
   448→            *self.rent_sponsor.key,
   449→        );
   450→        meta_config.cpi_context = Some(*self.cpi_context_account.key);
   451→        meta_config.input_queue = Some(*self.output_queue.key);
   452→
   453→        self.invoke_mint_action(instruction_data, meta_config, last_idx)
   454→    }
   455→
   456→    /// Invoke decompress for a single mint.
   457→    /// Extracts signer seeds from mint params (0, 1, or 2 seeds).
   458→    #[inline(never)]
   459→    fn invoke_decompress(
   460→        &self,
   461→        index: usize,
   462→        base_leaf_index: u32,
   463→        decompress_action: &DecompressMintAction,
   464→    ) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
   465→        let mint_params = &self.params.mints[index];
   466→        let (mint, bump) = get_mint_and_bump(mint_params);
   467→
   468→        let mint_data = build_mint_instruction_data(
   469→            mint_params,
   470→            self.mint_seed_accounts[index].key,
   471→            mint,
   472→            bump,
   473→        );
   474→
   475→        let instruction_data = MintActionCompressedInstructionData {
   476→            leaf_index: base_leaf_index + index as u32,
   477→            prove_by_index: true,
   478→            root_index: 0,
   479→            max_top_up: u16::MAX, // No limit
   480→            create_mint: None,
   481→            actions: vec![Action::DecompressMint(*decompress_action)],
   482→            proof: None,
   483→            cpi_context: None,
   484→            mint: Some(mint_data),
   485→        };
   486→
   487→        // For prove_by_index, the tree_pubkey must be state_merkle_tree for discriminator validation
   488→        let meta_config = MintActionMetaConfig::new(
   489→            *self.payer.key,
   490→            *self.payer.key,
   491→            *self.state_merkle_tree.key, // tree_pubkey - state merkle tree for discriminator check
   492→            *self.output_queue.key,      // input_queue
   493→            *self.output_queue.key,      // output_queue
   494→        )
   495→        .with_compressible_mint(
   496→            *self.mints[index].key,
   497→            *self.compressible_config.key,
   498→            *self.rent_sponsor.key,
   499→        );
   500→
   501→        self.invoke_mint_action(instruction_data, meta_config, index)
   502→    }
   503→
   504→    /// Invoke a mint action instruction.
   505→    /// Extracts signer seeds from mint params at the given index (0, 1, or 2 seeds).
   506→    #[inline(never)]
   507→    fn invoke_mint_action(
   508→        &self,
   509→        instruction_data: MintActionCompressedInstructionData,
   510→        meta_config: MintActionMetaConfig,
   511→        mint_index: usize,
   512→    ) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
   513→        let account_metas = meta_config.to_account_metas();
   514→        let ix_data = instruction_data
   515→            .data()
   516→            .map_err(|e| ProgramError::BorshIoError(e.to_string()))?;
   517→
   518→        // Collect all account infos needed for the CPI
   519→        let mut account_infos = vec![self.payer.clone()];
   520→
   521→        // System accounts
   522→        account_infos.push(self.system_accounts.light_system_program.clone());
   523→
   524→        // Add all mint seeds
   525→        for mint_seed in self.mint_seed_accounts {
   526→            account_infos.push(mint_seed.clone());
   527→        }
   528→
   529→        // More system accounts
   530→        account_infos.push(self.system_accounts.cpi_authority_pda.clone());
   531→        account_infos.push(self.system_accounts.registered_program_pda.clone());
   532→        account_infos.push(self.system_accounts.account_compression_authority.clone());
   533→        account_infos.push(self.system_accounts.account_compression_program.clone());
   534→        account_infos.push(self.system_accounts.system_program.clone());
   535→
   536→        // CPI context, queues, trees
   537→        account_infos.push(self.cpi_context_account.clone());
   538→        account_infos.push(self.output_queue.clone());
   539→        account_infos.push(self.state_merkle_tree.clone());
   540→        account_infos.push(self.address_tree.clone());
   541→        account_infos.push(self.compressible_config.clone());
   542→        account_infos.push(self.rent_sponsor.clone());
   543→
   544→        // Add all mint PDAs
   545→        for mint in self.mints {
   546→            account_infos.push(mint.clone());
   547→        }
   548→
   549→        let instruction = Instruction {
   550→            program_id: Pubkey::new_from_array(LIGHT_TOKEN_PROGRAM_ID),
   551→            accounts: account_metas,
   552→            data: ix_data,
   553→        };
   554→
   555→        // Build signer seeds - pack present seeds at start of array
   556→        let mint_params = &self.params.mints[mint_index];
   557→        let mut seeds: [&[&[u8]]; 2] = [&[], &[]];
   558→        let mut num_signers = 0;
   559→        if let Some(s) = mint_params.mint_signer_seeds {
   560→            seeds[num_signers] = s;
   561→            num_signers += 1;
   562→        }
   563→        if let Some(s) = mint_params.authority_seeds {
   564→            seeds[num_signers] = s;
   565→            num_signers += 1;
   566→        }
   567→        solana_cpi::invoke_signed(&instruction, &account_infos, &seeds[..num_signers])
   568→    }
   569→}
   570→
   571→/// Get mint PDA and bump, deriving mint always and bump if None.
   572→#[inline(never)]
   573→fn get_mint_and_bump(params: &SingleMintParams) -> (Pubkey, u8) {
   574→    let (mint, derived_bump) = super::find_mint_address(&params.mint_seed_pubkey);
   575→    let bump = params.mint_bump.unwrap_or(derived_bump);
   576→    (mint, bump)
   577→}
   578→
   579→/// Build MintInstructionData for a single mint.
   580→///
   581→/// `mint` and `bump` are derived externally from `mint_seed_pubkey` using `get_mint_and_bump`.
   582→#[inline(never)]
   583→fn build_mint_instruction_data(
   584→    mint_params: &SingleMintParams<'_>,
   585→    mint_signer: &Pubkey,
   586→    mint: Pubkey,
   587→    bump: u8,
   588→) -> MintInstructionData {
   589→    // Convert token_metadata to extensions if present
   590→    let extensions = mint_params
   591→        .token_metadata
   592→        .cloned()
   593→        .map(|metadata| vec![ExtensionInstructionData::TokenMetadata(metadata)]);
   594→
   595→    MintInstructionData {
   596→        supply: 0,
   597→        decimals: mint_params.decimals,
   598→        metadata: MintMetadata {
   599→            version: 3,
   600→            mint: mint.to_bytes().into(),
   601→            mint_decompressed: false,
   602→            mint_signer: mint_signer.to_bytes(),
   603→            bump,
   604→        },
   605→        mint_authority: Some(mint_params.mint_authority.to_bytes().into()),
   606→        freeze_authority: mint_params.freeze_authority.map(|a| a.to_bytes().into()),
   607→        extensions,
   608→    }
   609→}
   610→
   611→/// Get base leaf index from output queue account.
   612→#[inline(never)]
   613→fn get_base_leaf_index(output_queue: &AccountInfo) -> Result<u32, ProgramError> {
   614→    let queue = BatchedQueueAccount::output_from_account_info(output_queue)
   615→        .map_err(|_| ProgramError::InvalidAccountData)?;
   616→    Ok(queue.batch_metadata.next_index as u32)
   617→}
   618→
   619→/// Create multiple mints and decompress all to Solana accounts.
   620→///
   621→/// Convenience function that builds a [`CreateMintsCpi`] from a slice of accounts.
   622→///
   623→/// # Arguments
   624→///
   625→/// * `payer` - The fee payer account
   626→/// * `accounts` - The remaining accounts in the expected layout
   627→/// * `params` - Parameters for creating the mints
   628→///
   629→/// # Account Layout
   630→///
   631→/// - `[0]`: light_system_program
   632→/// - `[1..N+1]`: mint_signers (SIGNER)
   633→/// - `[N+1..N+6]`: system PDAs (cpi_authority, registered_program, compression_authority, compression_program, system_program)
   634→/// - `[N+6]`: cpi_context_account (writable)
   635→/// - `[N+7]`: output_queue (writable)
   636→/// - `[N+8]`: state_merkle_tree (writable)
   637→/// - `[N+9]`: address_tree (writable)
   638→/// - `[N+10]`: compressible_config
   639→/// - `[N+11]`: rent_sponsor (writable)
   640→/// - `[N+12..2N+12]`: mint_pdas (writable)
   641→/// - `[2N+12]`: compressed_token_program (for CPI)
   642→#[inline(never)]
   643→pub fn create_mints<'a, 'info>(
   644→    payer: &AccountInfo<'info>,
   645→    accounts: &'info [AccountInfo<'info>],
   646→    params: CreateMintsParams<'a>,
   647→) -> Result<(), ProgramError> {
   648→    if params.mints.is_empty() {
   649→        return Err(ProgramError::InvalidArgument);
   650→    }
   651→
   652→    let n = params.mints.len();
   653→    let mint_signers_start = 1;
   654→    let cpi_authority_idx = n + 1;
   655→    let registered_program_idx = n + 2;
   656→    let compression_authority_idx = n + 3;
   657→    let compression_program_idx = n + 4;
   658→    let system_program_idx = n + 5;
   659→    let cpi_context_idx = n + 6;
   660→    let output_queue_idx = n + 7;
   661→    let state_merkle_tree_idx = n + 8;
   662→    let address_tree_idx = n + 9;
   663→    let compressible_config_idx = n + 10;
   664→    let rent_sponsor_idx = n + 11;
   665→    let mint_pdas_start = n + 12;
   666→
   667→    // Build named struct from accounts slice
   668→    let cpi = CreateMintsCpi {
   669→        mint_seed_accounts: &accounts[mint_signers_start..mint_signers_start + n],
   670→        payer: payer.clone(),
   671→        address_tree: accounts[address_tree_idx].clone(),
   672→        output_queue: accounts[output_queue_idx].clone(),
   673→        state_merkle_tree: accounts[state_merkle_tree_idx].clone(),
   674→        compressible_config: accounts[compressible_config_idx].clone(),
   675→        mints: &accounts[mint_pdas_start..mint_pdas_start + n],
   676→        rent_sponsor: accounts[rent_sponsor_idx].clone(),
   677→        system_accounts: SystemAccountInfos {
   678→            light_system_program: accounts[0].clone(),
   679→            cpi_authority_pda: accounts[cpi_authority_idx].clone(),
   680→            registered_program_pda: accounts[registered_program_idx].clone(),
   681→            account_compression_authority: accounts[compression_authority_idx].clone(),
   682→            account_compression_program: accounts[compression_program_idx].clone(),
   683→            system_program: accounts[system_program_idx].clone(),
   684→        },
   685→        cpi_context_account: accounts[cpi_context_idx].clone(),
   686→        params,
   687→    };
   688→    cpi.invoke()
   689→}
   690→
   691→// // ============================================================================
   692→// // Client-side instruction builder
   693→// // ============================================================================
   694→
   695→// /// Client-side instruction builder for creating multiple mints.
   696→// ///
   697→// /// This struct is used to build instructions for client-side transaction construction.
   698→// /// For CPI usage within Solana programs, use [`CreateMintsCpi`] instead.
   699→// ///
   700→// /// # Example
   701→// ///
   702→// /// ```rust,ignore
   703→// /// use light_token::instruction::{CreateMints, CreateMintsParams, SingleMintParams};
   704→// ///
   705→// /// let params = CreateMintsParams::new(vec![mint1_params, mint2_params], proof);
   706→// ///
   707→// /// let instructions = CreateMints::new(
   708→// ///     params,
   709→// ///     mint_seed_pubkeys,
   710→// ///     payer,
   711→// ///     address_tree_pubkey,
   712→// ///     output_queue,
   713→// ///     state_merkle_tree,
   714→// ///     cpi_context_pubkey,
   715→// /// ).instructions()?;
   716→// /// ```
   717→// #[derive(Debug, Clone)]
   718→// pub struct CreateMints<'a> {
   719→//     pub payer: Pubkey,
   720→//     pub address_tree_pubkey: Pubkey,
   721→//     pub output_queue: Pubkey,
   722→//     pub state_merkle_tree: Pubkey,
   723→//     pub cpi_context_pubkey: Pubkey,
   724→//     pub params: CreateMintsParams<'a>,
   725→// }
   726→
   727→// impl<'a> CreateMints<'a> {
   728→//     #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
   729→//     pub fn new(
   730→//         params: CreateMintsParams<'a>,
   731→//         payer: Pubkey,
   732→//         address_tree_pubkey: Pubkey,
   733→//         output_queue: Pubkey,
   734→//         state_merkle_tree: Pubkey,
   735→//         cpi_context_pubkey: Pubkey,
   736→//     ) -> Self {
   737→//         Self {
   738→//             payer,
   739→//             address_tree_pubkey,
   740→//             output_queue,
   741→//             state_merkle_tree,
   742→//             cpi_context_pubkey,
   743→//             params,
   744→//         }
   745→//     }
   746→
   747→//     /// Build account metas for the instruction.
   748→//     pub fn build_account_metas(&self) -> Vec<AccountMeta> {
   749→//         let system_accounts = SystemAccounts::default();
   750→
   751→//         let mut accounts = vec![AccountMeta::new_readonly(
   752→//             system_accounts.light_system_program,
   753→//             false,
   754→//         )];
   755→
   756→//         // Add mint signers (from each SingleMintParams)
   757→//         for mint_params in self.params.mints {
   758→//             accounts.push(AccountMeta::new_readonly(
   759→//                 mint_params.mint_seed_pubkey,
   760→//                 true,
   761→//             ));
   762→//         }
   763→
   764→//         // Add system PDAs
   765→//         accounts.extend(vec![
   766→//             AccountMeta::new_readonly(system_accounts.cpi_authority_pda, false),
   767→//             AccountMeta::new_readonly(system_accounts.registered_program_pda, false),
   768→//             AccountMeta::new_readonly(system_accounts.account_compression_authority, false),
   769→//             AccountMeta::new_readonly(system_accounts.account_compression_program, false),
   770→//             AccountMeta::new_readonly(system_accounts.system_program, false),
   771→//         ]);
   772→
   773→//         // CPI context, output queue, address tree
   774→//         accounts.push(AccountMeta::new(self.cpi_context_pubkey, false));
   775→//         accounts.push(AccountMeta::new(self.output_queue, false));
   776→//         accounts.push(AccountMeta::new(self.address_tree_pubkey, false));
   777→
   778→//         // Config, rent sponsor
   779→//         accounts.push(AccountMeta::new_readonly(config_pda(), false));
   780→//         accounts.push(AccountMeta::new(rent_sponsor_pda(), false));
   781→
   782→//         // State merkle tree
   783→//         accounts.push(AccountMeta::new(self.state_merkle_tree, false));
   784→
